summary: Tested Edit Order feature (v61): PATCH /api/orders/{id}/edit, GET /api/orders/{id}/edits, seller pickup fields, vendor change handling. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: EditOrderModal with 5 tabs (Items, Customer, Shipping, Vendor, History), all data-testid attributes present, Seller Finance tab with Pickup Address section.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: AdminOrders.js had duplicate code at end of file (lines 546-559) - removed duplicate and properly added EditOrderModal component

Fixed: Seller response model was missing pickup fields (pickup_address, pickup_city, pickup_state, pickup_pincode, pickup_contact_name, pickup_contact_phone, shiprocket_pickup_nickname) - added to Seller Pydantic model in seller_router.py
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created/modified test data: order edits (audit rows), seller pickup fields. Test data prefixed with TEST_ for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Order feature fully tested. Key flows verified: (1) PATCH /api/orders/{id}/edit accepts partial OrderEditPayload with items, customer, ship_to, seller_id, notes, repush_shiprocket fields. (2) Edit endpoint validates target seller exists (404 if not found). (3) Rejects edits on 'delivered' or 'cancelled' orders with HTTP 400. (4) Persists audit row to order_edits collection with id, order_id, edited_by, edited_at, changed_fields, diff. (5) When items change, totals (subtotal/tax/total) are recomputed using 5% GST. (6) When seller_id changes, every item gets seller_id/seller_company stamped to new vendor, prices stay same. (7) GET /api/orders/{id}/edits returns audit history sorted newest-first, requires admin auth. (8) PUT /api/sellers/{id} accepts pickup_address, pickup_city, pickup_state, pickup_pincode, pickup_contact_name, pickup_contact_phone, shiprocket_pickup_nickname fields. (9) Frontend EditOrderModal has 5 tabs with proper data-testid attributes. (10) Seller Finance tab has Pickup Address section with all required fields.

edit_order_endpoint.details: PATCH /api/orders/{id}/edit works with partial payload, returns success/order/audit/shiprocket/vendor_changed

edit_order_validation.details: Validates seller exists (404), rejects delivered/cancelled orders (400)

audit_trail.details: Audit rows created in order_edits collection with full diff tracking

vendor_change.details: Seller_id stamped on all items, prices preserved

list_order_edits.details: GET /api/orders/{id}/edits returns sorted audit history, requires admin auth

seller_pickup_fields.details: PUT /api/sellers/{id} accepts and persists all 7 pickup fields

frontend_edit_modal.details: EditOrderModal with 5 tabs, all data-testid attributes present

frontend_seller_pickup.details: Finance tab has Pickup Address section with all fields and save button
